summary: Universal Error Fixer AI Agent testing complete. All backend APIs working (14/14 tests passed). Frontend UI card displays correctly with all features.

features_tested.details: Returns correct structure with agent_name, model, status, is_monitoring, stats, recent_errors, recent_fixes
Categories tracked: http_404, http_502, http_500, runtime, type_error, systematic, random, logic
Sources tracked: frontend, backend, api, database
Returns success, scan_time, errors breakdown (total, http, runtime, systematic), fixes breakdown
Starts continuous monitoring with configurable interval
Stops monitoring and updates is_monitoring status to false
Clears all tracked errors and resets stats to 0
Returns total_errors, by_category, by_source, fixes_applied, fixes_verified, auto_fix_rate
All endpoints return 401/403 when accessed without valid token

features_tested.feature: UI Card displays in AI Control Center
features_tested.details: Card visible under MARKETING & AI > AI Control Center

features_tested.feature: Card shows Universal Error Fixer Agent title
Card shows Gemini 3 Flash model badge
Error categories displayed (404, 502, Runtime, TypeError, Systematic)
features_tested.details: All 5 error categories shown with color-coded icons and counts
Button triggers scan API call and shows toast notification with results
Button available to clear error history
Bell icon shows notification count, toggle button controls monitoring state (shows Idle/Monitoring)

critical_code_review_comments: Universal Error Fixer implementation is well-structured with comprehensive error categorization
LLM integration uses Gemini 3 Flash via emergentintegrations library correctly
Auto-fix with rollback capability implemented in UniversalErrorFixerAgent class
Frontend card properly integrated with data-testid='universal-fixer-card' for testability
All API endpoints properly secured with authentication
seed_data_creation: None required - Agent uses system logs for error detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Universal Error Fixer Agent fully implemented and tested. Navigation path: Login -> AI Control Center (in sidebar under MARKETING & AI). The card shows error categories (404, 502, Runtime, TypeError, Systematic) with stats. API endpoints at /api/universal-fixer/*. Backend implementation in /app/backend/universal_error_fixer.py, Frontend card in /app/frontend/src/pages/AIAgentsDashboard.js (around line 977).

mocked_features.none: All features are fully implemented and functional. Uses Gemini 3 Flash via EMERGENT_LLM_KEY for AI analysis.
